## Summary

What does this change do?

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] UI or behavior change
- [ ] Build, release, or packaging

## Checks

- [ ] I kept the PR focused.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private logs, customer data, or assets I cannot contribute.
- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks, or explained why I could not.

## Notes

Large changes may need discussion first and may require a contributor agreement before they can be merged.
